name: Generalskie
description: A bold military-themed Soviet watch with strong wrist presence. A true General's watch.

name: Komandirskie Zakaz Mo USSR Blue
description: A collector favorite. Specially ordered by the Soviet military. Serial no.: 817103.

name: 500 year Anniversary Columbus
condition: Excellent working condition - some patina to the casing.
description: A rare soviet export piece blending bold exploration heritage with classic mechanical craftsmanship.

name: Komandirskie Paratrooper Gold
description: Soviet airborne identity on the wrist.

name: Komandirskie Airborne Troops Black
description: Forged for the airborne, worn by those who never follow the ground.

name: Komandirskie Gold 819980
description: Simple and elegant. Showcases the simplicity and endurance of Russian-made product.

name: Komandirskie 'Operation Desert Shield'
description: Historical time-piece. Made in 1990 to commemorate Operation Desert Shield, symbolizing Russia's support and allegiance to the USA.

name: Komandirskie 'Operation Desert Shield' cadet version
description: Historical time-piece. Made in 1990-1991 to commemorate Operation Desert Shield, symbolizing Russia's support and allegiance to the USA. Mini 34mm cadet version.

name: Russian Imperator
condition: Working - worn, with scratches on acrylic and bracelet
description: Gold-plated with in-built alarm mechanism. Made in 1993 to commemorate the 125th anniversary of the birth of the last Russian Tsar.

name: Buran
description: A Soviet-made Vostok Buran — built to echo the ambition of Russia’s space shuttle era, where engineering met the cosmos.

name: Capitan Chronoscope 4-Star
condition: Working - slight crack in the acrylic, not hindering time visual.
description: 90s Russian experimental design - when Soviet watchmaking broke the rules.
